timeline.title: COD estimate updated
timeline.detail: COD changed from 2028-02 to 2028-02-29 (source: AEMO Generation Information)

ownership_history.event: Project conceived as part of Reeves Plains Energy Hub

suppliers.scope: Design, engineering, equipment supply, civil construction, mechanical & electrical installation, 275 kV switchyard, ElectraNet connection, testing & commissioning

scheme_contracts.notes: CIS underwriting agreement secured from Commonwealth Government for Stage 1 BESS.

sources.title: Alinta Energy — Green light to construct Reeves Plains Energy Hub Battery
Alinta Energy — CIS Agreement secured for Reeves Plains BESS Stage 1
Energy-Storage.News — Alinta Energy green lights SA's largest BESS
GenusPlus secures $105M contract for Reeves Plains BESS

stages.name: Stage 1
stages.notes: GenusPlus EPC ($105M contract). CATL battery modules (194 units), Power Electronics inverters. Construction commenced mid-2025.

stages.name: Stage 2
stages.notes: Future expansion to total 500 MW / 2,000 MWh. Not yet committed.

timeline_events.title: Development approval granted by SA Government
timeline_events.detail: Approved by SA Minister for Planning John Rau for the broader Reeves Plains Energy Hub.

timeline_events.title: Alinta Energy gives green light to construct Stage 1 BESS
timeline_events.detail: Final investment decision for 250 MW / 1,000 MWh Stage 1. GenusPlus awarded $105M EPC contract.

timeline_events.title: Site preparation and early works commence
timeline_events.detail: Preparatory works began following FID, including procurement and site mobilisation.

timeline_events.title: Sod-turning ceremony — main construction formally commences
timeline_events.detail: Ceremonial construction start with Alinta and GenusPlus representatives.
